overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night exploration of the North Oak suburb. The camera travels along a wet multi-lane road, passes a vehicle, then ascends a grassy hillside to approach and circle the massive illuminated 'North Oak' sign while heavy rain falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet multi-lane suburban road at night

events.description: a dark sedan passes by on the wet road heading in the same direction

agents.ego_description: traveling steadily along the rain-soaked road with street lights illuminating the path

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past the camera on the wet asphalt, splashing water

entered.detail: large illuminated white sign on hillside spelling North Oak
multi-lane road with yellow dividing lines wet from heavy rain
tall modern street lamps illuminating the road with warm light
metal safety barriers along the right side of the road
sparse vegetation and shrubs along the roadside edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked multi-lane suburban road at night, with the illuminated North Oak sign visible in the distance on the left. The camera moves forward along the wet asphalt as a sedan passes by, while street lights and guardrails line the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside ascending toward the North Oak sign

events.description: camera turns left off the asphalt road onto the grassy hillside and begins ascending

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep grassy slope toward the illuminated sign on the hill

entered.detail: steep grass-covered terrain with patches of dirt ascending toward the sign
dense shrubs and bushes scattered across the hillside
upward-facing lights at the base of the sign illuminating the structure

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the paved road onto a grassy hillside, leaving the asphalt and guardrails behind. It begins ascending the slope through sparse vegetation, with the North Oak sign growing larger on the left and ground spotlights becoming visible at the base of the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside directly below the North Oak sign structure

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the hillside approaching the massive sign support structures

entered.detail: metal framework structures supporting the large sign letters

segments.scene_description: The camera continues ascending the grassy slope, now directly below the massive North Oak sign. Metal support towers become visible on the right, and the ground spotlights grow brighter as the camera approaches the base of the illuminated structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: immediate vicinity of the North Oak sign letters

events.description: rain becomes heavily visible against the bright illumination of the sign letters

agents.ego_description: moving extremely close to the massive illuminated letters, passing beneath the North Oak sign structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves extremely close to the massive North Oak sign, with the illuminated white letters filling the frame. Heavy rain is visible falling against the bright lights as the camera passes by the structure, with ground spotlights now positioned to the left at close range.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked suburban road that ascends a grassy hillside to reach a massive illuminated landmark. It begins by gliding forward along wet asphalt under the glow of street lights as a sedan passes by, with the North Oak sign visible in the far distance. As the camera leaves the paved road and guardrails behind, it transitions onto a sloping hillside, climbing through sparse vegetation while the sign grows larger and ground spotlights emerge from the gloom. The scene then shifts closer to the structure's base, passing metal support towers as the lighting intensifies. Finally, the camera moves extremely close to the massive white letters of the sign, filling the frame with bright light as heavy rain falls through the glow.
